---
title: "Problems have moved"
page-layout: full
toc: false
search: false
---

::: {.content-block .mn-legacy-note}
<p class="mn-kicker">NEW HOME</p>

## Problems now stay with their mathematical context

Exercise sequences and open investigations are collected with the course or article that introduces their ideas.

[Open the kolam problem sequence](../courses/resources/kolam-investigation/index.qmd#problems-to-carry-further){.btn .btn-primary}
[Browse course materials](../courses/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
:::
